title: symphyotrichum laeve var. concinnum
intro: Symphyotrichum laeve var. concinnum, also known as Smooth Blue Aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae, native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Smooth Blue Aster include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma, due to its bronchodilatory properties. Herbal preparations of Smooth Blue Aster can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
